yield_definition_original: gram yield=(mproduct-mcatalyst)/(mcatalyst*time); percent yield based on methane in feed
yield_standardization_note: Reported as CNT production yield; spent solid includes catalyst and TGA carbon.
CNT_type_evidence: TEM confirmed multi-walled nanotubes; dense well-aligned MWCNTs.
characterization_methods: FE-SEM; HR-TEM; Raman; TGA; XRD; N2 sorption
post_treatment_or_purification: none reported; acid leaching discussed as a general option
notes: purity_wt_percent is TGA carbon content of as-synthesized spent solid, not post-purification application-grade purity.
